div1.entryFree:
Mermaid, 1) a siren: thy --'s voice hath done me double wrong, Ven. 429. bewitching like the wanton --'s song, Ven. 429 as if some m. did their ears entice, Lucr. 1411. train me not, sweet m., with thy note, Err. III, 2, 45. I'll stop mine ears against the --'s song, Err. III, 2, 45 a m. on a dolphin's back, Mids. II, 1, 150. I'll drown more sailors than the m. H6C III, 2, 186.
2) water-nymph: Ant. II, 2, 212. Ant. II, 2, 212
